parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;

const rawQuery =
  typeof item.body?.query === "string" ? item.body.query :
  typeof item.query === "string" ? item.query :
  typeof item.chatInput === "string" ? item.chatInput :
  typeof item.input === "string" ? item.input :
  typeof item.question === "string" ? item.question :
  "";

const noiseWords = new Set([
  "chords",
  "chord",
  "lyrics",
  "tabs",
  "tab",
  "guitar",
  "ukulele",
  "piano",
  "bass",
  "by"
]);

const query = rawQuery
  .split(/\s+/)
  .filter(word => !noiseWords.has(word.toLowerCase()))
  .join(" ")
  .trim();

const rawBody = JSON.stringify({
  statement: `
    MATCH (s:Song)-[:BY_ARTIST]->(a:Artist)

    WITH
      s,
      a,
      toLower($query) AS q

    WITH
      s,
      a,
      q,
      trim(replace(q, toLower(a.name), "")) AS titleQueryRaw

    WITH
      s,
      a,
      q,
      titleQueryRaw,
      trim(replace(replace(replace(titleQueryRaw, "(", " "), ")", " "), "-", " ")) AS titleQuery

    WITH
      s,
      a,
      q,
      titleQuery,
      [w IN split(titleQuery, " ") WHERE trim(w) <> ""] AS titleWords

    WHERE
      s.id IS NOT NULL
      AND trim(s.id) <> ""
      AND s.id <> "unknown-unknown"
      AND s.title IS NOT NULL
      AND trim(s.title) <> ""
      AND a.name IS NOT NULL
      AND trim(a.name) <> ""
      AND (
        (
          size(titleWords) > 0
          AND ALL(word IN titleWords WHERE toLower(s.title) CONTAINS word)
        )
        OR (
          size(titleWords) = 0
          AND (
            toLower(s.title) CONTAINS q
            OR q CONTAINS toLower(s.title)
          )
        )
      )

    WITH s, a, q, titleQuery, titleWords
    OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(sec:Section)

    WITH
      s,
      a,
      q,
      titleQuery,
      titleWords,
      collect({
        order: sec.sectionOrder,
        section: sec.name,
        chord_line: sec.chord_line
      }) AS sections

    RETURN
      s.id AS songId,
      s.title AS title,
      a.name AS artist,
      s.url AS url,
      s.capo AS capo,
      s.summary AS summary,
      sections

    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN titleQuery <> "" AND toLower(s.title) = titleQuery THEN 100
        WHEN size(titleWords) > 0 AND ALL(word IN titleWords WHERE toLower(s.title) CONTAINS word) THEN 90
        WHEN titleQuery <> "" AND toLower(s.title) CONTAINS titleQuery THEN 80
        WHEN titleQuery = "" AND toLower(s.title) = q THEN 70
        WHEN titleQuery = "" AND toLower(s.title) CONTAINS q THEN 60
        ELSE 0
      END DESC,
      size(s.title) ASC

    LIMIT 1
  `.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim(),

  parameters: {
    query
  }
});

return [
  {
    json: {
      query,
      rawBody
    }
  }
];

const item = $input.first().json;

const rawBody = JSON.stringify({
  statement: `
    MERGE (s:Song {id: $songId})
    SET s.title = $title,
        s.key = $key,
        s.capo = $capo,
        s.tuning = $tuning,
        s.difficulty = $difficulty,
        s.summary = $summary,
        s.source = $source,
        s.url = $url

    MERGE (a:Artist {name: $artist})
    MERGE (s)-[:BY_ARTIST]->(a)

    FOREACH (tagName IN $tags |
      MERGE (t:Tag {name: tagName})
      MERGE (s)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t)
    )

    WITH s
    UNWIND $sections AS sec
    MERGE (secNode:Section {songId: $songId, sectionOrder: sec.order})
    SET secNode.name = sec.section,
        secNode.chord_line = sec.chordsText,
        secNode.lyrics = ""

    MERGE (s)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(secNode)

    WITH s, secNode, sec
    UNWIND range(0, size(sec.chords) - 1) AS idx
    WITH s, secNode, idx, sec.chords[idx] AS chordName
    MERGE (c:Chord {name: chordName})
    MERGE (secNode)-[:USES_CHORD {position: idx}]->(c)

    WITH s, secNode
    RETURN
      s.id AS songId,
      s.title AS title,
      count(DISTINCT secNode) AS sectionCount
  `.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim(),

  parameters: {
    songId: item.songId || "",
    title: item.title || "",
    artist: item.artist || "",
    key: item.key || "",
    capo: item.capo || "",
    tuning: item.tuning || "Standard",
    difficulty: item.difficulty || "",
    summary: item.summary || "",
    source: item.source || "ChordsWorld",
    url: item.url || "",
    tags: Array.isArray(item.tags) ? item.tags : [],
    sections: Array.isArray(item.sections)
      ? item.sections.map(sec => ({
          section: sec.section || "",
          order: sec.order || 0,
          chords: Array.isArray(sec.chords) ? sec.chords : [],
          chordsText: Array.isArray(sec.chords) ? sec.chords.join(" | ") : ""
        }))
      : []
  }
});

return [
  {
    json: {
      rawBody
    }
  }
];
